title: GO (No. 2) v. IBRD
text:
World Bank Administrative Tribunal
2025
Order No. 2025-02
GO (No. 2),
Applicant
v.
International Bank for Reconstruction and Development,
Respondent
World Bank Administrative Tribunal
Office of the Executive Secretary

GO (No. 2),
Applicant
v.
International Bank for Reconstruction and Development,
Respondent
1. On 10 March 2025, the Tribunal received an amended Application filed by the Applicant
against the Bank.
2. On 9 June 2025, the Applicant requested the withdrawal of his Application stating that he
had reached a settlement with the Bank.
3. On 18 June 2025, the Bank notified the Tribunal that it had no objection to the Applicant’s
request for withdrawal.
4. Accordingly, effective 15 August 2025, the Tribunal has decided to dismiss the Application
and grant the Applicant’s request for anonymity.
DECISION
The Application is dismissed.

2
/S/Janice Bellace
Janice Bellace
President
/S/ Zakir Hafez
Zakir Hafez
Executive Secretary
At Washington, D.C., 15 August 2025
